title: ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. kuepferi
intro: Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. kuepferi is a subspecies of the Ranunculus pyrenaeus plant, which is a type of buttercup native to the Pyrenees mountains. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. kuepferi include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and aid in the relief of cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. kuepferi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory well-being.
